calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2017 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Award Of Reasonable Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Mar-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sean Makarin, Esq. (415-777-1800) for Plaintiff/Moving party DAVID LEVY.
John Park Jennings, Esq. (650-989-5400) for Defendant/opposing party Patricia Megowan.

The Court announces the tentative ruling and the reasons for it. This is a wrongful eviction action pursuant to 998. Plaintiff seeks fees and costs, defendant points out inconsistencies. The Court has reduced the amount. ARGUED. Plaintiff argues to be reimbursed with all costs and hours worked on the case which is supported by case law. Defendant argues amount given by the Court is reasonable, block billing and cites CCP 128.7. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling with modification as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID LEVY Motion For Award Of Reasonable Attorney Fees is GRANTED in the amount of $16,720 (22.56 hours at $400/hour and 38.48 at $200/hour) in fees and $894 in costs. Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details)Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Set For Trial On Apr-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
